name: Clawarena-v2
description: Full 12-scene benchmark: hil_s1 (reference MC) + 6 original EC scenes (hil_f3/g3/d3/i2/g1/j1) + 5 new EC scenes (hil_f7/g4/c7/h3/e4), 337 total rounds.

tests.desc: NexaRetail Q1 2025 customer churn analysis — 4-person engineering team with AI agent, 8 contradictions across 7 sessions, 4 dynamic updates, 5 progressive preference rules (P1-P5)

Quantitative trading system timezone incident (V3 strategy DST bug causing A-share midday break violation) — 4 contradictions, 4 dynamic updates, 5 progressive preference rules (P1-P5), 32 rounds with 75% exec_check
Salary data leak investigation -- cloud download and email forwarding across 5 history sessions, 4 dynamic updates, 5 progressive preference rules (P1-P5), 30 rounds with 73% exec_check
ICU nursing staffing crisis -- systematic overtime under-reporting across 5 history sessions, 4 dynamic updates, 5 progressive preference rules (P1-P5), 30 rounds with 73% exec_check

Research data reuse accusation response -- deduplication dispute and pipeline version discrepancy across 5 history sessions, 4 dynamic updates, 5 progressive preference rules (P1-P5), 30 rounds with 70% exec_check
Candidate background check discrepancy -- team size inflation and employment gap across 5 history sessions, 4 dynamic updates, 5 progressive preference rules (P1-P5), 30 rounds with 73% exec_check

MCN brand data fraud investigation -- systematic performance metric inflation across 4 history sessions, 4 dynamic updates, 5 progressive preference rules (P1-P5), 30 rounds with 73% exec_check (Chinese language scene)

618 GPU e-commerce fraud dispute -- order JD-618-2026-7891234 (GPU-A100-80G vs A40-48G substitution, ¥40,999 diff) across 4 dynamic updates, 5 progressive preference rules (P1-P5), 27 rounds with 70% exec_check

Wrongful termination + PIP compliance investigation -- 40-day PIP vs 60-day legal minimum (20-day shortfall, non-compliant) across 4 dynamic updates, 5 progressive preference rules (P1-P5), 27 rounds with 70% exec_check

API security breach regulatory response -- CVE-2024-47891 (CVSS 7.5, ~518.6h exposure, 2340 records / 891 customers affected) with 72h notification window analysis across 4 dynamic updates, 5 progressive preference rules (P1-P5), 28 rounds with 71% exec_check

CS101 plagiarism dispute -- MOSS 95% similarity with dual git history timeline reconstruction (Wang Ming D-2 14:22 vs Chen Wei D-1 20:00, ~1778 min diff) across 4 dynamic updates, 5 progressive preference rules (P1-P5), 27 rounds with 70% exec_check

GlobalBridge Nairobi grant compliance audit -- Community Mobilization 139.4% overspend ($131K vs $94K approved) against $933K total budget across 3 dynamic updates, 5 progressive preference rules (P1-P5), 24 rounds with 70% exec_check
